description: Product Description PCKOBEVER Dipping Bowls 4 pcs Stainless Steel Serving Bowls Our set of 4 stainless steel dipping bowls will add a touch of elegance to your table. The simple yet exquisite design will make your food look even more appetising. Made from stainless steel, our dipping bowls are drop resistant and sturdy. They are also lightweight yet sturdy and can withstand high and low temperatures. Our stainless steel dipping bowls are easy to clean thanks to their smooth surface. You can simply wipe them clean or put them in the dishwasher for hassle-free cleaning. Our dipping bowls are stackable, making them easy to store and saving valuable space in your kitchen. They are also microwave, fridge and dishwasher safe, making them a versatile addition to your kitchen. Product Description Durability Sturdy enough to withstand a mixture of heat, cold and acid made of certain stainless steel. Wire drawing technology By using the wire drawing technology internally, the surface is smooth, easy to clean, and resistant to rust. Smooth bottom With a simple design, it is shallow and wide so that you can evenly stir the sauce. Features Manufactured stainless steel, safe and sturdy. The simple, clean design is deep and wide to ensure even mixing. Suitable for dipping sauces such as and sour, mustard and soy sauce. Also use these bowls for serving little dishes, dessert, appetizer, soup, prepping recipes, condiments and so on. Suitable for home, restaurants, food shops, catering halls. Versatile Use Our dipping bowls are suitable for a wide range of applications, from barbecue sauce and salad dressing to small snacks and desserts. They are also great for use in restaurants, outdoor barbecues, and picnics.
